support.detail: Live motion is a technology-agnostic design engagement, the wedge to re-open the paused $218k solution deal. All ranked moves are rep/VP-level: get Adrian Jacobs to return SOW/MSA redlines, get a business sponsor named, hold a pre-kickoff connect. The CIO (true budget authority) is unengaged on a build-vs-buy strategy, but peer outreach could be handled by a CRO/SVP and is premature before the design engagement produces TCO proof.
support.why_not_vp: A CRO/SVP could carry any peer/exec outreach to the unengaged CIO; nothing here requires the CEO personally.

monitor.reason: No qualifying <=14-day trigger: deal is not large (218k<250k) and not forecasted (T2 out); latest build-vs-buy signal is 2026-03-27 (>14 days, T3 out); our open deliverables are entangled with buyer-dependent inputs (redlines, attendee list, sponsor naming) with no <=14-day activity showing an isolated lapse on our side (T1 soft).
